productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Blah White Top
description: Style NoteIf your liitle angel's mantra in life is to talk, talk, talk, and talk some more, this white and yellow striped top from little miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little chatterboxes, this tee is all you need to tell the world that a little talkative magpie is in their midst! Team it with jeans, shorts or caprisProduct DetailsWhite and yellow striped sleeveless top, has a round neckline with frills, a small frill from the shoulders, graphic print and glitter on the front and a band at the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
